posts.raw_content:
I opened a couple of threads earlier that had multiple top comments of people being against the Iran war, making puns about Trump and how he's controlled by Israel, people shitting on some policies that they consider not to be America First etc etc

In the replies you'd see multiple people supporting the war in Iran, and people who have different opinions than the ones referenced in the first part of this post

This place has freethinkers, and people with own opinions. I can't believe how ""the other side"" got so brainwashed that they have this idea of right wingers being these old retards. 

Meanwhile, you go on reddit or the lib side of X, or bluesky or whatever and you quite literally see a bunch of circlejerks. Like, the whole MAHA movement. Not a single "Well, I hate Trump, but yeah, I think removing fake dye from food is a good thing" type of comments. SNL even spoofs shit like this instead of saying 'yeah, we did billion anti-MAGA memes, let's make one praising something good, surely saying that working out is better than smoking and doing drugs is not that controversial"

I actually saw a popular lib X account making a post with LOTS of likes being like "hehe, the right wingers are silent on Afroman winning his free speech case hehe" ..... and literally few hours later the liberals turned on Afroman when they found out he voted for Trump. 

I can't believe this is how the world is. That's why we keep reading about 'infighting' on the right, cause it's filled with people with their own thoughts and opinions and this always leads  to discourse and debates, while the left was built up to not be real, but instead just a bunch of people who are brainwashed and wait for their next installing of propaganda so they can replace the Ukraine flag with LGBT flag with Palestine flag, with Venzuela flag with Iran flag with....

I think this is by design, as for example, we have guys like Tucker, Candace, RFK, even MTG, and the others while the modern left (Obama onwards) operated on trying to not have too many 'in your face' people so they can not be attacked (i mean..i might be an idiot, but...who was Obama's Tulsi? Obama's RFK? Obama's Tucker? Obama's Charlie Kirk, Obama's...whatever? We all know the liberals control the media but you can't say that....The View is the same as Tucker or whatever.... Buuuut that's a whooole other topic... I just wanted to say that I love this place and I love seeing people not just blindly supporting everything and it has a more 'real people' feeling rather than other parts of the internet)
